title: AEP v1.2 Policy-as-Code Rego Record
description: v1.2 immune-system primitive (operator source.md L21). Some rules should not live in prompts; they should live in executable policy. Operator-named 4 example rules verbatim: 'Do not promote claims with laundering_score > 0.6' / 'do not run executable validation without sandbox permission' / 'do not accept reviewer quorum if principal IDs are not distinct' / 'do not export private evidence without redaction.' Operator L21 cites Open Policy Agent/Rego as 'strong precedent.' Lineage EXTENDS Open Policy Agent + Rego policy language. v1.2 ships one-way export to Rego (full import STAGED v1.3+). Composes_with: v1.1 F14 RaterQuorumAttestation (quorum-distinct-principal rule) + v1.2 F24 (private-export-without-redaction rule) + v1.2 SandboxGate (sandbox-permission rule). A4 + A5 + A6 + A11 adversary closures all mappable to policy rules per HV closure summary.

policy_kind.description: Which gate class this policy enforces.

expression.description: The Rego policy expression. Examples (operator L21 verbatim): 'deny[reason] { input.claim.laundering_score > 0.6; reason := "laundering_score above promotion threshold" }'.

rego_dialect.description: Rego language dialect. v0 (legacy) vs v1 (modern, opa 0.46+).

compiled_against_opa_version.description: OPA version this policy was compiled and tested against (e.g., '0.65.0'). Per sec73.1 API-verification-law: cite docs or do not call.

policy_target_field_path.description: JSON path to the input field this policy evaluates. Example: '$.claim.basis_source_ids' or '$.review.principal_ids'.

civilian_phrasing.description: Plain-language explanation when policy denies. Banned-term linter applies.

enforced_in_ci.description: Whether the policy fires as a CI gate (true) or advisory-only (false). HV closures HARD-CONSTRAINED policies MUST be true.

test_fixture_path.description: Path to the CI test fixture that exercises both PASS and FAIL paths.

external_precedents.description: F18 lineage. Policy-as-code EXTENDS: Open Policy Agent + Rego policy language + CNCF policy primitives.

violation_outcome.civilian_phrasing: This claim's source provenance looks suspicious — too many sources trace back to AI-generated content. Promotion blocked until evidence chain is checked.

lineage_basis.verifying_grep: rg 'open policy agent|rego|opa policy' --type md research/sources/
